channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: George Ruto Celebrates Award in Viral Matatu Video Amid Safety Concerns
item.description: A video of George Kimutai, President William Ruto’s youngest son, celebrating aboard his flashy Baba Yaga matatu has gone viral. The celebration, which took place on May 2, followed his recognition fo...

item.title: Wu Yize takes 10-7 lead over Shaun Murphy on opening day of World Snooker final
item.description: Chinese snooker prodigy Wu Yize made a commanding start in his first World Snooker Championship final at the Crucible, establishing a 10-7 lead over 2005 champion Shaun Murphy after the opening day. D...

item.title: Early Trends in Kerala Assembly Elections Show UDF Leading in Initial Counting
item.description: The counting of votes for the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections began on Monday at 8 am. Early trends indicate that the Congress-led United Democratic Front (UDF) is leading in ten constituencies, while ...

item.title: Andaman and Nicobar Islands achieve Guinness records with underwater human stack and flag display
item.description: The Andaman and Nicobar Islands have achieved a notable feat by setting two Guinness World Records within a span of two days, showcasing a blend of coordination, endurance, and national pride. The hig...

item.title: Daughter of Bondi Beach terror victim gives evidence at Antisemitism royal commission
item.description: The Royal Commission into Antisemitism in Australia has begun its public hearings, with one of the first witnesses being Sheina Gutnick, daughter of Reuven Morrison, who was killed in the Bondi Beach ...

item.title: Ken Karunas Shines in Heartfelt Coming-of-Age Film 'Youth'
item.description: Ken Karunas, son of Tamil actor-comedian Karunas, makes a strong impression with his first directorial and lead performance in the film 'Youth'. The movie tells the story of Praveen, a carefree 15-yea...

item.title: ADC Factional Chairman Denies Reports of Threats and Regret Over Party Crisis
item.description: The factional chairman of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Nafi’u Bala, don clear say all di talk wey dey go round about am regretting him involvement in the party wahala na lie. Some reports de...

item.title: KZN Political Parties Debate Responses to Illegal Immigration and Protests
item.description: In KwaZulu-Natal, political parties clashed in the provincial legislature over recent protests targeting illegal foreign nationals. The debates highlighted both the ongoing xenophobic tensions and dif...

item.title: Philippine Lawmaker Leads Peaceful Flag-Raising Mission at Sandy Cay
item.description: On May 4, 2026, Akbayan Party-list Representative Dadah Kiram Ismula led a peaceful mission to Sandy Cay (Pag-asa Cay 2) in the West Philippine Sea, carrying out a symbolic jet-ski ride to plant the P...

item.title: Counting of Votes Begins for West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: West Bengal is witnessing high political drama on May 4, 2026, as counting of votes for the Assembly elections has begun for all 293 constituencies. The state has been under intense scrutiny following...

item.title: Ichung'wah Criticizes Kang'ata Over UDA Exit and Political Conduct
item.description: Nairobi – National Assembly Majority Leader Kimani Ichung'wah has openly criticised Murang'a Governor Irungu Kang'ata following his decision to leave the United Democratic Alliance (UDA) party ahead o...

item.title: Exploring Payment Models for Surrogacy in Australia
item.description: The Australian Law Reform Commission is reviewing surrogacy laws to ensure they reflect current societal views. At present, only altruistic surrogacy is allowed across the country, meaning surrogates ...

item.title: Kaduna Security Institute Commends Governor Uba Sani on Kaduna Peace Initiative
item.description: The National Institute for Security Studies (NISS) don commend Governor Uba Sani for the way dem don dey handle security for Kaduna State using the Kaduna Peace Model. Uduak Uduak Ituen, wey lead Exec...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli secures third consecutive victory at the Miami Grand Prix
item.description: Kimi Antonelli continued his impressive start to the 2026 Formula 1 season by winning the Miami Grand Prix, marking his third consecutive victory after triumphs in China and Japan. The 19-year-old Ita...

item.title: US launches effort to assist stranded ships amid Iran conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced on May 4, 2026, a US-led operation aimed at assisting ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz due to the ongoing US-Israeli conflict with Iran. The move, described a...

item.title: Atiku Questions Falling Reserves Despite Oil Windfall, Urges Better Economic Management
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar don raise serious concern over the steady drop in Nigeria’s external reserves, even as global oil prices dey high due to Middle East crisis. According to data from...

item.title: Reviewing the Albanese Government’s First Year in Office
item.description: One year after Anthony Albanese’s Labor Party won a historic 94 out of 150 seats in the House of Representatives, the government has been working on fulfilling its election promises amid a range of do...

item.title: Understanding the Connection Between Menopause and Cholesterol Levels
item.description: Recent research highlights a significant connection between menopause and rising cholesterol levels in women. As women enter their 40s and transition through menopause, hormonal changes, particularly ...

item.title: Eddie Howe Set to Remain as Newcastle Manager After Successful Talks
item.description: Eddie Howe, manager of Newcastle United, is set to continue in his role after fruitful discussions with the club’s Saudi Arabian owners. This development comes after a tough season for the club, which...

item.title: Sen. Fetterman Criticizes Socialist Influence in Democratic Party
item.description: During a recent appearance on Fox News, Pennsylvania Senator John Fetterman expressed concern over what he perceives as a growing socialist trend within the Democratic Party. Fetterman discussed the M...
